features: SIX-SOCKET EXTENSION LEAD WITH SAFETY SHUTTERED SOCKETS: Which automatically close when not in use preventing the insertion of foreign objects for user safety. It offers an affordable and reliable solution for everyday power needs within the home
EXTEND THE REACH OF WALL SOCKETS: The 3 metre cable provides power where you need it the most. Ideal for home offices, bedrooms and living spaces. Certified to BS1363-2 safety standards
OPTION TO WALL-MOUNT FOR ADDITIONAL FLEXIBILITY: Offers a space saving design by keeping the extension lead off the floor with a wall-fixing capability. Ideal for small spaces
A COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Slim, white profile which blends seamlessly with any décor. Allows you to use up to six devices simutaneously
MASTERPLUG'S 1-YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a one-year warranty, Masterplug have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
